title: AuraLairs[Default]
description: This is Mashup pack Used By RemmyArc
body:
# **RemmyArc's Texture Pack!**

_Game Version :  1.20.1_<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/shVqS5lW--c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
_Pack Version :  1.0_
# Features : 
      - Low Fire
      - No Pumpkin Blur
      - Improved Glint
      - Secret Messages!
      - Animated items
      - Less particle
      - No More Explosion Particles!
      - Improved for Crystal Pvp

# Installation
For PC Users -

Download the File from the Versions Tab

Open your resourcepacks folder in your .minecraft folder

Copy and paste the .zip / .rar file into the resourcepacks folder

AuraLairs has been installed!


If you face any more issues, kindly watch this video
